key.name: pause-logging
key.description: When enabled, Hushlog does not capture new notifications.

key.name: denylist
key.description: Case-insensitive substrings that prevent matching notifications from being logged.

key.name: menu-entry-limit
key.description: Maximum number of recent notifications shown in the panel menu.

key.name: sweep-before
key.description: Notifications logged at or before this ISO 8601 timestamp are hidden from the panel menu but kept in the history file.

key.name: panel-box
key.description: Which section of the top bar the Hushlog indicator sits in.

key.name: panel-position
key.description: Index of the Hushlog indicator within its panel box. Lower values sit closer to the box's inner edge.
